subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of propitious fortune, how blessed were ye, and how auspicious was the moon and felicitous the sun, that on this day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران نیک اختر چه خوش بخت بودید و همایون ماه و فرخنده مهر که در این روز
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @music and singing
